description.unified: Deals ??? Physical DMG to enemies within range 2 times. The first hit knocks enemies down for [3 sec->1.5sec]. This skill applies Defense Penetration [(added) 800 higher]. [(removed) reduces DEF Penetration by 250 for 10 sec]
For [15 sec->8 sec], increases the ATK of all allies by ???, Attack Speed by [300->10%], and Physical DEF by ???. [(removed) dispels negative effects]

Charges forward and deals ??? Physical DMG to nearby enemies 12 times. While casting, the caster is immune to status effects. The final hit freezes enemies for [4 sec->2sec] and increases Physical DMG taken by [(added) 16%] for 10sec. [(removed) draws enemies in]

Every 1 sec, increases ATK by ???, Status Resistance by [30->10], and damage dealt to non-hero enemies by [1.5%->1%]. This effect stacks up to [20->30] times. At [20->(removed)] stacks, increases DMG of normal attacks by 100%.

IV.unified: Draws in nearby enemies while casting. [(removed) DMG increased by 25%]
Status Resistance increases by [(added) 10] for each stack. [(removed) ATK Boost increased by 25%]

dark.unified: ATK increase amount increases by [?->50%]. [(removed) ATK Spd boost of 200]

description.unified: [Smash] reduces the target's ATK by [20%->25%] and increases the P.DMG they take by {0}% for 10 sec.
[Battle Roar] Reduces Mana Cost by 1 and increases targets Crit DMG by {0}% for the duration of Skill.
[Vortex] increases DMG by [50%->{0}%], and its last hit increases the [All->Physical] DMG the target takes by {1}% for 10 Sec.
[Enrage] Changes the max number of stacks to [30->40] and upon gaining 30 stacks, increases own DEF Penetration by {0}.

dark.unified: Recovers HP every second equal to 10% of ATK, and for every 1% HP lost, all damage taken is reduced by [0.6%->0.5%].

description.unified: Max HP increases by {0}%, and Normal Attacks have a 15% chance to deal additional Physical Damage equal to {1}% of Attack Power and freeze the target for [2 sec->1 sec].

Summons the soul of Holy Bird, Numinu, triggering [Numinu’s Storm]. Enemies within range take ??? P.DMG every 0.5sec and have their ATK SPD reduced by [100->30%] for 5 sec. The ATK SPD reduction stacks up to 10 times. At max stacks, enemies are Frozen and take [30%->40%] increased P.DMG for 5sec. [(removed) own ATK increased by 60% for 8 sec]

2.from: Changes the P.DMG Boost effect to 50%, and every hit dispels positive effects from the enemy.
2.to: Changes the increased P.DMG the enemies take to 50%, and every hit dispels positive effects from the enemy.
2.unified: Changes the increased P.DMG the enemies take to 50%, and every hit dispels positive effects from the enemy.
